runners.formComment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 2 length fourth (17.17) over 300m at Healesville. Likely to find this too tough.

formComments.title: TAB
formComments.comment: Hit the ground running with a slick early sectional but ran over late and missed the frame when a 2 length fourth (17.17) over 300m at Healesville. Likely to find this too tough.

runners.formComment: Won two starts back after racing on the pace at this track over 400m in 22.94. Couldn't repeat the feat last time out when fifth over 400m at this track at Mix 6/7 level. Look for improvement. Not out of it.

formComments.title: TAB

runners.formComment: Showed good improvement when second behind Papa Who at this track last start over 400m (23.06). Has good early speed and will stick on.

formComments.comment: Showed good improvement when second behind Papa Who at this track last start over 400m (23.06). Has good early speed and will stick on.

runners.formComment: Last appeared when seventh over 460m at this track ten months ago. Awkward draw and looks safely held this time.

runners.formComment: Good effort last time when third (17.30) over 300m at Healesville. Others preferred.

runners.formComment: Big odds last time but hit the ground running with a fast early split, paving the way for a neck win at this track over 400m in 23.07. Recorded one of the quickest times on the card last time. Worth following up.
